rulings.Case Title: PAULA DANIELS VS. ROCCO ANZALDI ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 4, 2017 line 3. DEFENDANT ROCCO ANZALDI DEMURRER to COMPLAINT Sustained without leave to amend. Notice is fatally defective. The notice is fatally defective. As a matter of law, p was required to serve a 30 or 60 day notice to quit per cc 1946 and 1946.1 to effectuate an eviction based on habitual late payment.= (501/REQ)
